subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the King, the Mighty, the Great, which have been sent down in truth as a remembrance unto all the worlds, perfumed with divine fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک العزیز العظیم نزلت بالحق و انها تذکره للعالمین قد تعطر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
